statuses.description: The event is scheduled to be played.
The event is currently being played.
The event has ended and final results are available.
The event has been canceled and will not be played.

result_types.description: Final result after all regular periods.
Result at the end of the first half.
Result at the end of the second quarter.
Result if the game went into overtime.

event_statistics.description: Total points scored in the event.
Total fouls committed by both teams.
Percentage of time each team had the ball.

team_statistics.description: Total points scored by the team.
Total rebounds collected by the team.
Total assists made by the team.
Total number of turnovers committed by the team.

player_statistics.description: Total points scored by a player.
Number of assists made by a player.
Total rebounds collected by a player.
The percentage of successful field goal attempts by a player.

incidents.description: A player is substituted for another.
